refs.summary: Adds daemon-owned product event projection schema, source-ref extraction, product/trace visibility, and tests proving safe payload_summary boundaries.
Attaches the same safe payload_summary projection to bridge-authored turn/browser events and asserts the bridge event constructor contract.
Existing GUI consumes typed runtime events and derives tool kind/detail without owning runtime semantics.
Existing GUI summary renderer keeps collapsed work minimal and builds expanded work rows from daemon-projected runtime state.
